    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Class ContentTransformer

    Represents the transform of a Content.
    Applies a transform to the underlaying content object (usually a Mesh, a Camera or a light)

    Inheritance
    object
    ContentTransformer
    FixedTransformer
    RigidTransformer
    SkinnedTransformer
